parā-√vṛj P. -vṛṇakti (impf. -vṛṇak; pf. -vavṛjur; aor. -vark, -varktam),
to turn away;
(with śīrṣā) to flee,  RV. ;
to wring off (as a head),  ib. ;
to throw away, remove, reject, abandon,  ib.

results.rendered_html: parāvṛj (von varj mit parā) m. Verstossener, Auswürfling ( SĀY.  erklärt meistens als N. pr.): yābhiḥ śacībhirvṛṣaṇā parāvṛjaṃ prāndhaṃ śroṇaṃ cakṣasa etave kṛthaḥ  ṚV. 1,112,8 . nīcā santamudanayaḥ parāvṛjam 2,13,12 . āvirbhavannudatiṣṭhatparāvṛk 15,7 . saratpadā na dakṣiṇā parāvṛk 10,61,8 .
